S.FORM: == Lolood i Kaliyawan == Lolood i Kaliyawan ano eca Takofoan lalood han ko sowal , o nano Kavalan (Kebalan) ato Sakizaya a lekapotan lalood to Mancin i 1878 mihecaan . Pakayni tonini a demak o sakatadamaan no finacadan sa'etal Kalinko, maeminay matekop ko Kavalan ato Sakizaya i lekapotan lalood itiya, oya mafadocay a tamdaw tayra to i niyaro' no 'Amis a milimek . Oya midamaay to sofitay no Mancin a Cikasoan ngasaw o satata'angay to a niyaro' i dafdaf Cilay (Kilay) itiya, tangasa to i laloodan no Cikasoan a malasawad . 'Ayaw laloodan no demak Naikoran no lalood no Motan sangasaw, kafana'en to no Macin ko pasawali "Ausoa/Husan" "aniniay Kalinko, Posong) a katadamaanan : 50. O sapikidakidaw to Ausoa satena', saka maocor ci Shen Baozhen kakeridan no Mancin to sapi "palalan" ato "pipahima to yincumin" latosaan paecasan : 50 . Sakidemak malitosa katimol, sasifo'an ko pakayraan a lalan, saka patireng to kasasilsil citodongay kakeridan, patodong to sofitay, lalekoan o citodongay cisakowan ko Mancin i Ausoa sanay : 50 . Nanoya patireng to mipamatangay kofa, mitahidang to Payrang tayni i Ausoa mimatang : 50. O pi"palalan pipahima to yincumin" a satao' i malengat to ko sofal ka'oripan no yincumin, saka ira no piliyang no yincumin to Mancin. Kaliyawan tamdaw (Kavalan finacadan) (加禮宛人 ) Kaliyawan (Kaliawan) Sakizaya ato Cikasoan 'Amis finacadan a polong no sowal to Kalinkoay Kavalan tamdaw a sowal : 32 . I 1840 mihecaan nai Kaliyawan minato (aniniay no Tongsan alo' Lanyang cepo') mafolaw tayni i Kaliyawan (aniniay Cili no Kalinko) : 32, malafiyaw to katimolay nano Sakizaya finacadan tamdaw : 31. Tona sapicomahadan to paniyaro'an pala pasayra i Milon alo' ko Kaliyawan tamdaw i, mafahfah no Sakizaya finacadan. Naka nawhani o sapisoraraw to picalap no Truku finacadan ko Kaliyawan, orasaka sasinga'ay sato kona tosaay a finacadan a malekapot ko ka'oripan, o nano malekapotay milood to Truku tamdaw i sa'etalan no lotok : 32. Sakifinawlan tamdaw, nawhani sopsop sato tayni micoeco ko Payrang i Lanyang dafdaf, saka o 'alomanay Kavalan finawlan tamdaw mafolaw to tayni sa'amisan no Kalinko. Dotocen ko tilid no Mancin sifo, tangasa kacidemak no lalood ira to ko Kaliyawan, Cualin, Wunuan, Cicea, Tanabing, Yaoku enemay niyaro' finawlan : 32 . Citodong mikerid ci Lo Tacun ko to nai'amisay itiya, kinapinapina ko Truku finacadan miliyang itiya . Nanoya o Mancin mikerih to Kavalan (Kaliyawan) ato Sakizaya finacadan malekapot mitena', halo kakitaan ko nisanga'ayan, nanoya manga'ay saan ko nengneng no Mancin to kakihar toni a tosaay finacadan : 56 . Nengnengen nai tilid ko Kaliyawan finacadan ato Sakizaya finacadan o so'elinay doedo sanay caayay ka papina a finacadan : 59 ; nika ikor to mitongal ho ko Mancin to sofitay tayni i Cilay, itiya to maliyang ko na tosaay finacadan to Mancin : 59. Sakizaya finacadan O aro' no Sakizaya itiniay i dafdaf no Cilay i Kalinko, o sofal naira nai katimol no Lio 'alo, ka'amis no Kowa' 'alo a sa'etal, o sakiemelay finacadan itiya ho : 36 . Satata'angay niyaro' o Takobowan, i tilid no Mancin o "Cinlawyi ngasaw, Cinyiyi ngasaw, Cuuwan ngasaw" : 120 . Dotocen ko sowal no mato'asay ci Huang Cinwen, tamdaw no Takobowan niyaro' i, makasepat no mihecaan ko selal kinacecay ko pacakatan itira mililis i Nongpi 'alo, Milon 'alo, Sansien 'alo niliyokan no fitonay a aol : 120 . Toloay ko sacomod kasadakan noya fitonay aol, matiya o tadamanay satena' adipel ko raan. Midotoc to 'ayaw no kalaloodan, papotalay no niyaro' a miliyokay fitonay aol ira ko 60 no masaadipelay, cikerohen oya fitonay aol marafasay to 300 mihecaan saan . Faku I 1876 miheca 11 folad, nipalekapot to Nataoran ato Kowa' niyayaro' ko Kaliyawan tamdaw, nisalafii milood to sofitay, halo pilood han to Payrang, pakatengil to ko kakeridan no Fucien ci Ding Richang tayni sato i Taywan a misalof tonini a demak . Naikoran pasi kakeridan no Kowa' ngasaw to demak, pahapinang o caayay ko nikasasowalan, masamatira o caayay ka laheci ko sapilood no Kaliyawan tamdaw2): 63 . Maherek misalof tonini a demak, ceringen ni Ding Richang ci Wu Guangliang mikotay ci Zhang Qiguang citodong kakeridan no sofitay i Taywan, mifalic to lalekoan no sofitay : 9 . Saka tosa miheca, nai Fucen ci Wu Guangliang mikerid to Fifuyin ato Sienciangin, midoedo to Payawan micomod i Pinoyumayan : 71 . Ikor nai Kohkoh, Fata'an, ato ni Wu Quancheng a sofitay : 71 . Nawhani 'aloman ko finawlan no Kalinko, misawad ci Wu Quancheng to nai ka'amisay, sasifo'ay lalan a micomod to Husan, padeteng sa nai timolay lalan ko kalolala no sofitay : 71 . Misafa'eloh pasilsil to kaitodongan no sofitay, nai 1876 mihecaan caay ka tadamaan ko lalood, nika saki pasawalian no Taywan mafiyoll to ko paecasan no nisetekan : 71. Pakayraan no demak I 1878 miheca 6 folad 18 romi'ad, tena'en no Kaliyawan tamdaw ko sofitay no Mancin to sapiliala to felac a tulid. Saka tosa romi'ad malisiked miliyok to Cuapo (Kali, Pipo) a lalong no sofitay, madoka' ko micokeray kakeridan sofitay no Mancin ci Chen Desheng, mapatay ko kapot kakeridan ci Yang Yugui, paratohen ni Xia Xianlun aci Wu Guangliang ko no Fucien tapang ci Wu Zancheng, papisapinang to lalengatan no demak. o paratoh a paretatenga ni Xia Xianlun, o lalengatan no demak o nai Payrang a tamdaw ci Chen Huihuang mi'aca to felac a malaliyaliyang, oya ci Chen Huihuang o marariday misamsam to finacadan tamdaw, o nian ko kacangalan no Kaliyawan tamdaw : 32 . Paretatenga sa ko ikoray to tamdaw a mikingkiw caay ka dengan kalali'aca ko kalaliyangan, o lalengatan no demak oya itiraay i lalong a sofitay misamsam to fafahiyan no niyaro', o misa'alingayay no ina ko Kaliyawan tamdaw masa'opo tayra i lalong no sofitay a miliyang, nikawrira misatalifokil ko citodongay to milengatay to demak, patayen aca koya miliyangay finacadan a tamdaw, o nianan koya sapiliyang no Kaliyawan tamdaw to Mancin : 82 . Nawhani o "masatamdaway finacadan" ko Kaliyawan, mili'ayaw mihinom ko Mancin, nanoya ocoren ko citodongay tayra niyaro' no Kaliyawan mihinom to finawlan, nanoya mapalasawaday aca ko tatiih no demak. nika toyaan ocoren haca no Mancin ci Zhang Zhaolian ko sofitay, nano masapatotay demak to 2 folad i malaliyaw haca masasiwtoc, patayen no Kaliyawan tamdaw ko kakeridan ca Wen Yulin 10 tamdaw : 84. 'Ayaw o nano sini'adaay ci Wu Zancheng tonini a demak, misalatiih to cingra to sapilenlenaw mitekop to Kaliyawan a sangasaw, nanoyaan mitelek to ko sofitay no Mancin a mi'epec to Kaliyawan a ngasaw : 84. Ocoren ni Wu Zancheng kakeridan no sofitay ci Sun Kaihua mitekop, ato sofitay no riyaran saka pito, pakatamina tayra i Kalinko minato : 131. Naitiya ceringen ko Fucin tosaay komi no sofitay tayra i Sincen nitena' i Cuapo, patongal to sofitay to 2000 tamdaw : 131. Nao mili'ayaw ko halaka ni Sun Kaihua milefek to Kaliyawan. Nikawrira i 9 folad 5 romi'ad i pisolap i Milon itiya, malipalaw no Kaliyawan tamdaw, mapatay ko pinapina no Mancin. Orasaka li'ayaw sato ci Sun Kaihua milood to i Takofuan niyaro' a Sakizayan finacadan, paliteked to Kaliyawan ngasaw : 131. Saka tosa romi'ad, ocoren ni Sun Kaihua ko midamaay kakeridan ci Li Guang pakaitira i Milon minato to sofitay, patayraen ko itiraay i Sincen sofitay i Cuapo pakamaro' : 131. Oci Sun Kaihua ko mikeriday to sofitay milood to Kaliyawan ngasaw, nika niocoran ci Hu Dexing, Wu Ligui, Zhu Shangpan , Li Ying (Commander-in-Chief), ato ci Liu Hongshun mikerid to sofitay tayra i Takofuan : 131 . Matengil noya kakeridan no Kaliyawan ngasaw ci Dafu Wanu i, tangsol sa mikerid to finawlan midama to Takofuan, nika matena' no sofitay no Mancin, mapatay aca ci Dafu Wanu itiya : 131 . O nano mataliyokay no fitonay a aol ko salawacan no Takofuan niyaro', caay pakacomod ko sofitay no Mancin . Rikor mafana' to ko sofitay toya toloay cinanomay sacomod 'adawang, itiya to midoedo toya pakayraan sacood a milood . Nika oya sacomod madadi'ec, tona micomod ko sofitay i, malipalaw no Sakizaya tamdaw a mipatay . Itiya sato o lamal to ko sapilood no sofitay no Mancin, pasifitonay a aol milood to lamal, saka maemin to malefek to ko niyaro' . Nanoya o kasasowasowal to no kakitaan no niyaro' masasowal a mitelek, maocor han to ko kakeridan ci Komod Pazik ato fafahi ci Icep Kanasaw tayra i sofitay no Mancin to katapi' . Ikor no katapi' no Sakizaya tamdaw i, tatingen no sofitay i kilang no tool ci Komod Pazik a mipatay . Roma sato pala'en no sofitay ko ta'akay tool a kilang, 'atepen ci Icep Kanasaw i sasifo', ta kalicen no mo'etepay tamdaw a miripa' milepi, itiya i ka'atep a mapatay . Ceringen no sofitay no Mancin papinengneng i lawac ko Sakizaya tadaw ato 'Amis tamdaw, todong pipatalaw . I 9 folad 7 romi'ad to kacereman no rimi'ad, miliya haca ko sofitay no Mancin milood to Kaliyawan tamdaw, caay to pakafilo k Kaliyawan tamdaw, satararikor sato : 131. Palalefolefod sa ko pilood, nika caay kafana' to pakayraan, o semosemotan ko pilimekan no Kaliyawan tamdaw, nanoya patiko sato ko sofitay no Mancin, padoedo to masasongarad : 131. Saka tosa kacereman no rimi'ad, pakaikatimol aoaolan milood ci Wu Guangliang, ci Sun Kaihua sato milipalaw nai kaetip katimol miraod, itira to i salaedan no Milon 'alo milipalaw milood to Kaliyawan ngasaw : 131 . Kalahokan to, malood to ni Sun Jun ko pikacawan no Kaliyawan tamdaw, mapatay ko salofan semo'ot tamdaw no Kaliyawan, milaliw to ko mafadocay : 131. Nanoyaan, oya kecor sanay a Natawran, Pokpok a sangasaw o doedo sanay to : 132. Nanoya o Truku finacadan milipalaw a milood to Kaliyawan, mataliyok to no kawali, kaetip, katimol, ka'amis a ada saka tapi' sato : 132 . Piharatengan
S.PHON: == ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i kaɾijawan == ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i kaɾijawan ano~u əʦa tako~ufo~uan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ħan ko~u so~uwaɾ , o~u nano~u kab~vaɾan (kəb~b~vaɾan) ato~u saki*aja a ɾəkapo~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u manʦin i **** miħəʦaan . pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan saʡətaɾ kaɾinko~u, maəminaj matəko~up ko~u kab~vaɾan ato~u saki*aja i ɾəkapo~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, o~uja mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw tajra to~u i nijaro~uʡ no~u ʡamis a miɾimək . o~uja miɬ~ɮamaaj to~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin a ʦikaso~uan ŋasaw o~u satataʡaŋaj to~u a nijaro~uʡ i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ʦiɾaj (kiɾaj) itija, taŋasa to~u i ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ʦikaso~uan a maɾasawaɬ~ɮ . ʡajaw ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u mo~utan saŋasaw, kafanaʡən to~u no~u maʦin ko~u pasawaɾi "ao~u~uso~ua/ħo~u~usan" "aniniaj kaɾinko~u, po~uso~uŋ) a kataɬ~ɮamaanan : **. o~u sapikiɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮaw to~u ao~u~uso~ua satənaʡ, saka mao~uʦo~ur ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u manʦin to~u sapi "paɾaɾan" ato~u "pipaħima to~u jinʦo~u~umin" ɾato~usaan paəʦasan : ** . sakiɬ~ɮəmak maɾito~usa katimo~uɾ, sasifo~uʡan ko~u pakajraan a ɾaɾan, saka patirəŋ to~u kasasiɾsiɾ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj kakəriɬ~ɮan, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u so~ufitaj, ɾaɾəko~uan o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦisako~uwan ko~u manʦin i ao~u~uso~ua sanaj : ** . nano~uja patirəŋ to~u mipamataŋaj ko~ufa, mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ to~u pajraŋ tajni i ao~u~uso~ua mimataŋ : **. o~u pi"paɾaɾan pipaħima to~u jinʦo~u~umin" a satao~uʡ i maɾəŋat to~u ko~u so~ufaɾ kaʡo~uripan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, saka ira no~u piɾijaŋ no~u jinʦo~u~umin to~u manʦin. kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw (kab~vaɾan finaʦaɬ~ɮan) (**** ) kaɾijawan (kaɾiawan) saki*aja ato~u ʦikaso~uan ʡamis finaʦaɬ~ɮan a po~uɾo~uŋ no~u so~uwaɾ to~u kaɾinko~uaj kab~vaɾan tamɬ~ɮaw a so~uwaɾ : ** . i **** miħəʦaan nai kaɾijawan minato~u (aniniaj no~u to~uŋsan aɾo~uʡ ɾanjaŋ ʦəpo~uʡ) mafo~uɾaw tajni i kaɾijawan (aniniaj ʦiɾi no~u kaɾinko~u) : **, maɾafijaw to~u katimo~uɾaj nano~u saki*aja finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw : **. to~una sapiʦo~umaħaɬ~ɮan to~u panijaro~uʡan paɾa pasajra i miɾo~un aɾo~uʡ ko~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw i, mafaħfaħ no~u saki*aja finaʦaɬ~ɮan. naka nawħani o~u sapiso~uraraw to~u piʦaɾap no~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan ko~u kaɾijawan, o~urasaka sasiŋaʡaj sato~u ko~una to~usaaj a finaʦaɬ~ɮan a maɾəkapo~ut ko~u kaʡo~uripan, o~u nano~u maɾəkapo~utaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u tro~u~uko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw i saʡətaɾan no~u ɾo~uto~uk : **. sakifinawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw, nawħani so~upso~up sato~u tajni miʦo~uəʦo~u ko~u pajraŋ i ɾanjaŋ ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf, saka o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj kab~vaɾan finawɾan tamɬ~ɮaw mafo~uɾaw to~u tajni saʡamisan no~u kaɾinko~u. ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u manʦin sifo~u, taŋasa kaʦiɬ~ɮəmak no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ira to~u ko~u kaɾijawan, ʦo~u~uaɾin, wo~u~uno~u~uan, ʦiʦəa, tanab~b~viŋ, jao~uko~u~u ənəmaj nijaro~uʡ finawɾan : ** . ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ mikəriɬ~ɮ ʦi ɾo~u taʦo~u~un ko~u to~u naiʡamisaj itija, kinapinapina ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan miɾijaŋ itija . nano~uja o~u manʦin mikəriħ to~u kab~vaɾan (kaɾijawan) ato~u saki*aja finaʦaɬ~ɮan maɾəkapo~ut mitənaʡ, ħaɾo~u kakitaan ko~u nisaŋaʡajan, nano~uja maŋaʡaj saan ko~u nəŋnəŋ no~u manʦin to~u kakiħar to~uni a to~usaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan : ** . nəŋnəŋən nai tiɾiɬ~ɮ ko~u kaɾijawan finaʦaɬ~ɮan ato~u saki*aja finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u so~uʡəɾinaj ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sanaj ʦaajaj ka papina a finaʦaɬ~ɮan : ** ; nika iko~ur to~u mito~uŋaɾ ħo~u ko~u manʦin to~u so~ufitaj tajni i ʦiɾaj, itija to~u maɾijaŋ ko~u na to~usaaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan to~u manʦin : **. saki*aja finaʦaɬ~ɮan o~u aro~uʡ no~u saki*aja itiniaj i ɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf no~u ʦiɾaj i kaɾinko~u, o~u so~ufaɾ naira nai katimo~uɾ no~u ɾio~u ʡaɾo~u, kaʡamis no~u ko~uwaʡ ʡaɾo~u a saʡətaɾ, o~u sakiəməɾaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan itija ħo~u : ** . satataʡaŋaj nijaro~uʡ o~u tako~ub~b~vo~uwan, i tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u manʦin o~u "ʦinɾawji ŋasaw, ʦinjiji ŋasaw, ʦo~u~uo~u~uwan ŋasaw" : *** . ɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦən ko~u so~uwaɾ no~u mato~uʡasaj ʦi ħo~u~uaŋ ʦinwən, tamɬ~ɮaw no~u tako~ub~b~vo~uwan nijaro~uʡ i, makasəpat no~u miħəʦaan ko~u səɾaɾ kinaʦəʦaj ko~u paʦakatan itira miɾiɾis i no~uŋpi ʡaɾo~u, miɾo~un ʡaɾo~u, sansiən ʡaɾo~u niɾijo~ukan no~u fito~unaj a ao~uɾ : *** . to~uɾo~uaj ko~u saʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ kasaɬ~ɮakan no~uja fito~unaj ao~uɾ, matija o~u taɬ~ɮamanaj satənaʡ aɬ~ɮipəɾ ko~u raan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ʡajaw no~u kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, papo~utaɾaj no~u nijaro~uʡ a miɾijo~ukaj fito~unaj ao~uɾ ira ko~u ** no~u masaaɬ~ɮipəɾaj, ʦikəro~uħən o~uja fito~unaj ao~uɾ marafasaj to~u *** miħəʦaan saan . fako~u~u i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, nipaɾəkapo~ut to~u natao~uran ato~u ko~uwaʡ nijajaro~uʡ ko~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, nisaɾafii miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj, ħaɾo~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ħan to~u pajraŋ, pakatəŋiɾ to~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u fo~u~uʦiən ʦi ɬ~ɮiŋ riʦħaŋ tajni sato~u i tajwan a misaɾo~uf to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak . naiko~uran pasi kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u ko~uwaʡ ŋasaw to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, paħapinaŋ o~u ʦaajaj ko~u nikasaso~uwaɾan, masamatira o~u ʦaajaj ka ɾaħəʦi ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw*): ** . maħərək misaɾo~uf to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦəriŋən ni ɬ~ɮiŋ riʦħaŋ ʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ miko~utaj ʦi *ħaŋ *i*o~u~uaŋ ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj i tajwan, mifaɾiʦ to~u ɾaɾəko~uan no~u so~ufitaj : * . saka to~usa miħəʦa, nai fo~u~uʦən ʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u fifo~u~ujin ato~u siənʦiaŋin, miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u pajawan miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pino~ujo~u~umajan : ** . iko~ur nai ko~uħko~uħ, fataʡan, ato~u ni wo~u~u *o~u~uanʦħəŋ a so~ufitaj : ** . nawħani ʡaɾo~uman ko~u finawɾan no~u kaɾinko~u, misawaɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uanʦħəŋ to~u nai kaʡamisaj, sasifo~uʡaj ɾaɾan a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħo~u~usan, paɬ~ɮətəŋ sa nai timo~uɾaj ɾaɾan ko~u kaɾo~uɾaɾa no~u so~ufitaj : ** . misafaʡəɾo~uħ pasiɾsiɾ to~u kaito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan no~u so~ufitaj, nai **** miħəʦaan ʦaaj ka taɬ~ɮamaan ko~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nika saki pasawaɾian no~u tajwan mafijo~uɾɾ to~u ko~u paəʦasan no~u nisətəkan : **. pakajraan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, tənaʡən no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u sapiɾiaɾa to~u fəɾaʦ a to~u~uɾiɬ~ɮ. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maɾisikəɬ~ɮ miɾijo~uk to~u ʦo~u~uapo~u (kaɾi, pipo~u) a ɾaɾo~uŋ no~u so~ufitaj, maɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ ko~u miʦo~ukəraj kakəriɬ~ɮan so~ufitaj no~u manʦin ʦi ʦħən ɬ~ɮəsħəŋ, mapataj ko~u kapo~ut kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi jaŋ jo~u~u*o~u~ui, parato~uħən ni xia xianɾo~u~un aʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ ko~u no~u fo~u~uʦiən tapaŋ ʦi wo~u~u *anʦħəŋ, papisapinaŋ to~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u parato~uħ a parətatəŋa ni xia xianɾo~u~un, o~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nai pajraŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦħən ħo~u~uiħo~u~uaŋ miʡaʦa to~u fəɾaʦ a maɾaɾijaɾijaŋ, o~uja ʦi ʦħən ħo~u~uiħo~u~uaŋ o~u marariɬ~ɮaj misamsam to~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nian ko~u kaʦaŋaɾan no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw : ** . parətatəŋa sa ko~u iko~uraj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mikiŋkiw ʦaaj ka ɬ~ɮəŋan kaɾaɾiʡaʦa ko~u kaɾaɾijaŋan, o~u ɾaɾəŋatan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak o~uja itiraaj i ɾaɾo~uŋ a so~ufitaj misamsam to~u fafaħijan no~u nijaro~uʡ, o~u misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u ina ko~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw masaʡo~upo~u tajra i ɾaɾo~uŋ no~u so~ufitaj a miɾijaŋ, nikawrira misataɾifo~ukiɾ ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u miɾəŋataj to~u ɬ~ɮəmak, patajən aʦa ko~uja miɾijaŋaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan a tamɬ~ɮaw, o~u nianan ko~uja sapiɾijaŋ no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw to~u manʦin : ** . nawħani o~u "masatamɬ~ɮawaj finaʦaɬ~ɮan" ko~u kaɾijawan, miɾiʡajaw miħino~um ko~u manʦin, nano~uja o~uʦo~urən ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj tajra nijaro~uʡ no~u kaɾijawan miħino~um to~u finawɾan, nano~uja mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj aʦa ko~u tatiiħ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. nika to~ujaan o~uʦo~urən ħaʦa no~u manʦin ʦi *ħaŋ *ħao~uɾian ko~u so~ufitaj, nano~u masapato~utaj ɬ~ɮəmak to~u * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i maɾaɾijaw ħaʦa masasiwto~uʦ, patajən no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦa wən jo~u~uɾin ** tamɬ~ɮaw : **. ʡajaw o~u nano~u siniʡaɬ~ɮaaj ʦi wo~u~u *anʦħəŋ to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak, misaɾatiiħ to~u ʦiŋra to~u sapiɾənɾənaw mitəko~up to~u kaɾijawan a saŋasaw, nano~ujaan mitəɾək to~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin a miʡəpəʦ to~u kaɾijawan a ŋasaw : **. o~uʦo~urən ni wo~u~u *anʦħəŋ kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u so~ufitaj ʦi so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua mitəko~up, ato~u so~ufitaj no~u rijaran saka pito~u, pakatamina tajra i kaɾinko~u minato~u : ***. naitija ʦəriŋən ko~u fo~u~uʦin to~usaaj ko~umi no~u so~ufitaj tajra i sinʦən nitənaʡ i ʦo~u~uapo~u, pato~uŋaɾ to~u so~ufitaj to~u **** tamɬ~ɮaw : ***. nao~u miɾiʡajaw ko~u ħaɾaka ni so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua miɾəfək to~u kaɾijawan. nikawrira i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i piso~uɾap i miɾo~un itija, maɾipaɾaw no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, mapataj ko~u pinapina no~u manʦin. o~urasaka ɾiʡajaw sato~u ʦi so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u i tako~ufo~u~uan nijaro~uʡ a saki*ajan finaʦaɬ~ɮan, paɾitəkəɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan ŋasaw : ***. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uʦo~urən ni so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua ko~u miɬ~ɮamaaj kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ɾi *o~u~uaŋ pakaitira i miɾo~un minato~u to~u so~ufitaj, patajraən ko~u itiraaj i sinʦən so~ufitaj i ʦo~u~uapo~u pakamaro~uʡ : ***. o~uʦi so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u so~ufitaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan ŋasaw, nika nio~uʦo~uran ʦi ħo~u~u ɬ~ɮəxiŋ, wo~u~u ɾi*o~u~ui, *ħo~u~u sħaŋpan , ɾi jiŋ (ʦo~ummanɬ~ɮər-in-ʦħiəf), ato~u ʦi ɾio~u~u ħo~uŋsħo~u~un mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u so~ufitaj tajra i tako~ufo~u~uan : *** . matəŋiɾ no~uja kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u kaɾijawan ŋasaw ʦi ɬ~ɮafo~u~u wano~u~u i, taŋso~uɾ sa mikəriɬ~ɮ to~u finawɾan miɬ~ɮama to~u tako~ufo~u~uan, nika matənaʡ no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, mapataj aʦa ʦi ɬ~ɮafo~u~u wano~u~u itija : *** . o~u nano~u mataɾijo~ukaj no~u fito~unaj a ao~uɾ ko~u saɾawaʦan no~u tako~ufo~u~uan nijaro~uʡ, ʦaaj pakaʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin . riko~ur mafanaʡ to~u ko~u so~ufitaj to~uja to~uɾo~uaj ʦinano~umaj saʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ʡaɬ~ɮawaŋ, itija to~u miɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~uja pakajraan saʦo~uo~uɬ~ɮ a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ . nika o~uja saʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ maɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮiʡəʦ, to~una miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ ko~u so~ufitaj i, maɾipaɾaw no~u saki*aja tamɬ~ɮaw a mipataj . itija sato~u o~u ɾamaɾ to~u ko~u sapiɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, pasifito~unaj a ao~uɾ miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ɾamaɾ, saka maəmin to~u maɾəfək to~u ko~u nijaro~uʡ . nano~uja o~u kasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ masaso~uwaɾ a mitəɾək, mao~uʦo~ur ħan to~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ pa*ik ato~u fafaħi ʦi iʦəp kanasaw tajra i so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u katapiʡ . iko~ur no~u katapiʡ no~u saki*aja tamɬ~ɮaw i, tatiŋən no~u so~ufitaj i kiɾaŋ no~u to~uo~uɾ ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ pa*ik a mipataj . ro~uma sato~u paɾaʡən no~u so~ufitaj ko~u taʡakaj to~uo~uɾ a kiɾaŋ, ʡatəpən ʦi iʦəp kanasaw i sasifo~uʡ, ta kaɾiʦən no~u mo~uʡətəpaj tamɬ~ɮaw a miripaʡ miɾəpi, itija i kaʡatəp a mapataj . ʦəriŋən no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin papinəŋnəŋ i ɾawaʦ ko~u saki*aja taɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pipataɾaw . i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kaʦərəman no~u rimiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾija ħaʦa ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u k kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, satarariko~ur sato~u : ***. paɾaɾəfo~uɾəfo~uɬ~ɮ sa ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nika ʦaaj kafanaʡ to~u pakajraan, o~u səmo~usəmo~utan ko~u piɾiməkan no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja patiko~u sato~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u masaso~uŋaraɬ~ɮ : ***. saka to~usa kaʦərəman no~u rimiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakaikatimo~uɾ ao~uao~uɾan miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ, ʦi so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua sato~u miɾipaɾaw nai kaətip katimo~uɾ mirao~uɬ~ɮ, itira to~u i saɾaəɬ~ɮan no~u miɾo~un ʡaɾo~u miɾipaɾaw miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan ŋasaw : *** . kaɾaħo~ukan to~u, maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ni so~u~un *o~u~un ko~u pikaʦawan no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, mapataj ko~u saɾo~ufan səmo~uʡo~ut tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾijawan, miɾaɾiw to~u ko~u mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj : ***. nano~ujaan, o~uja kəʦo~ur sanaj a natawran, po~ukpo~uk a saŋasaw o~u ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sanaj to~u : ***. nano~uja o~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan miɾipaɾaw a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan, mataɾijo~uk to~u no~u kawaɾi, kaətip, katimo~uɾ, kaʡamis a aɬ~ɮa saka tapiʡ sato~u : *** . piħaratəŋan
S.FORM: == Lolood i Kaliyawan == Lolood i Kaliyawan ano eca Takofoan lalood han ko sowal , o nano Kavalan (Kebalan) ato Sakizaya a lekapotan lalood to Mancin i 1878 mihecaan . Pakayni tonini a demak o sakatadamaan no finacadan sa'etal Kalinko, maeminay matekop ko Kavalan ato Sakizaya i lekapotan lalood itiya, oya mafadocay a tamdaw tayra to i niyaro' no 'Amis a milimek . Oya midamaay to sofitay no Mancin a Cikasoan ngasaw o satata'angay to a niyaro' i dafdaf Cilay (Kilay) itiya, tangasa to i laloodan no Cikasoan a malasawad . 'Ayaw laloodan no demak Naikoran no lalood no Motan sangasaw, kafana'en to no Macin ko pasawali "Ausoa/Husan" "aniniay Kalinko, Posong) a katadamaanan : 50. O sapikidakidaw to Ausoa satena', saka maocor ci Shen Baozhen kakeridan no Mancin to sapi "palalan" ato "pipahima to yincumin" latosaan paecasan : 50 . Sakidemak malitosa katimol, sasifo'an ko pakayraan a lalan, saka patireng to kasasilsil citodongay kakeridan, patodong to sofitay, lalekoan o citodongay cisakowan ko Mancin i Ausoa sanay : 50 . Nanoya patireng to mipamatangay kofa, mitahidang to Payrang tayni i Ausoa mimatang : 50. O pi"palalan pipahima to yincumin" a satao' i malengat to ko sofal ka'oripan no yincumin, saka ira no piliyang no yincumin to Mancin. Kaliyawan tamdaw (Kavalan finacadan) (加禮宛人 ) Kaliyawan (Kaliawan) Sakizaya ato Cikasoan 'Amis finacadan a polong no sowal to Kalinkoay Kavalan tamdaw a sowal : 32 . I 1840 mihecaan nai Kaliyawan minato (aniniay no Tongsan alo' Lanyang cepo') mafolaw tayni i Kaliyawan (aniniay Cili no Kalinko) : 32, malafiyaw to katimolay nano Sakizaya finacadan tamdaw : 31. Tona sapicomahadan to paniyaro'an pala pasayra i Milon alo' ko Kaliyawan tamdaw i, mafahfah no Sakizaya finacadan. Naka nawhani o sapisoraraw to picalap no Truku finacadan ko Kaliyawan, orasaka sasinga'ay sato kona tosaay a finacadan a malekapot ko ka'oripan, o nano malekapotay milood to Truku tamdaw i sa'etalan no lotok : 32. Sakifinawlan tamdaw, nawhani sopsop sato tayni micoeco ko Payrang i Lanyang dafdaf, saka o 'alomanay Kavalan finawlan tamdaw mafolaw to tayni sa'amisan no Kalinko. Dotocen ko tilid no Mancin sifo, tangasa kacidemak no lalood ira to ko Kaliyawan, Cualin, Wunuan, Cicea, Tanabing, Yaoku enemay niyaro' finawlan : 32 . Citodong mikerid ci Lo Tacun ko to nai'amisay itiya, kinapinapina ko Truku finacadan miliyang itiya . Nanoya o Mancin mikerih to Kavalan (Kaliyawan) ato Sakizaya finacadan malekapot mitena', halo kakitaan ko nisanga'ayan, nanoya manga'ay saan ko nengneng no Mancin to kakihar toni a tosaay finacadan : 56 . Nengnengen nai tilid ko Kaliyawan finacadan ato Sakizaya finacadan o so'elinay doedo sanay caayay ka papina a finacadan : 59 ; nika ikor to mitongal ho ko Mancin to sofitay tayni i Cilay, itiya to maliyang ko na tosaay finacadan to Mancin : 59. Sakizaya finacadan O aro' no Sakizaya itiniay i dafdaf no Cilay i Kalinko, o sofal naira nai katimol no Lio 'alo, ka'amis no Kowa' 'alo a sa'etal, o sakiemelay finacadan itiya ho : 36 . Satata'angay niyaro' o Takobowan, i tilid no Mancin o "Cinlawyi ngasaw, Cinyiyi ngasaw, Cuuwan ngasaw" : 120 . Dotocen ko sowal no mato'asay ci Huang Cinwen, tamdaw no Takobowan niyaro' i, makasepat no mihecaan ko selal kinacecay ko pacakatan itira mililis i Nongpi 'alo, Milon 'alo, Sansien 'alo niliyokan no fitonay a aol : 120 . Toloay ko sacomod kasadakan noya fitonay aol, matiya o tadamanay satena' adipel ko raan. Midotoc to 'ayaw no kalaloodan, papotalay no niyaro' a miliyokay fitonay aol ira ko 60 no masaadipelay, cikerohen oya fitonay aol marafasay to 300 mihecaan saan . Faku I 1876 miheca 11 folad, nipalekapot to Nataoran ato Kowa' niyayaro' ko Kaliyawan tamdaw, nisalafii milood to sofitay, halo pilood han to Payrang, pakatengil to ko kakeridan no Fucien ci Ding Richang tayni sato i Taywan a misalof tonini a demak . Naikoran pasi kakeridan no Kowa' ngasaw to demak, pahapinang o caayay ko nikasasowalan, masamatira o caayay ka laheci ko sapilood no Kaliyawan tamdaw2): 63 . Maherek misalof tonini a demak, ceringen ni Ding Richang ci Wu Guangliang mikotay ci Zhang Qiguang citodong kakeridan no sofitay i Taywan, mifalic to lalekoan no sofitay : 9 . Saka tosa miheca, nai Fucen ci Wu Guangliang mikerid to Fifuyin ato Sienciangin, midoedo to Payawan micomod i Pinoyumayan : 71 . Ikor nai Kohkoh, Fata'an, ato ni Wu Quancheng a sofitay : 71 . Nawhani 'aloman ko finawlan no Kalinko, misawad ci Wu Quancheng to nai ka'amisay, sasifo'ay lalan a micomod to Husan, padeteng sa nai timolay lalan ko kalolala no sofitay : 71 . Misafa'eloh pasilsil to kaitodongan no sofitay, nai 1876 mihecaan caay ka tadamaan ko lalood, nika saki pasawalian no Taywan mafiyoll to ko paecasan no nisetekan : 71. Pakayraan no demak I 1878 miheca 6 folad 18 romi'ad, tena'en no Kaliyawan tamdaw ko sofitay no Mancin to sapiliala to felac a tulid. Saka tosa romi'ad malisiked miliyok to Cuapo (Kali, Pipo) a lalong no sofitay, madoka' ko micokeray kakeridan sofitay no Mancin ci Chen Desheng, mapatay ko kapot kakeridan ci Yang Yugui, paratohen ni Xia Xianlun aci Wu Guangliang ko no Fucien tapang ci Wu Zancheng, papisapinang to lalengatan no demak. o paratoh a paretatenga ni Xia Xianlun, o lalengatan no demak o nai Payrang a tamdaw ci Chen Huihuang mi'aca to felac a malaliyaliyang, oya ci Chen Huihuang o marariday misamsam to finacadan tamdaw, o nian ko kacangalan no Kaliyawan tamdaw : 32 . Paretatenga sa ko ikoray to tamdaw a mikingkiw caay ka dengan kalali'aca ko kalaliyangan, o lalengatan no demak oya itiraay i lalong a sofitay misamsam to fafahiyan no niyaro', o misa'alingayay no ina ko Kaliyawan tamdaw masa'opo tayra i lalong no sofitay a miliyang, nikawrira misatalifokil ko citodongay to milengatay to demak, patayen aca koya miliyangay finacadan a tamdaw, o nianan koya sapiliyang no Kaliyawan tamdaw to Mancin : 82 . Nawhani o "masatamdaway finacadan" ko Kaliyawan, mili'ayaw mihinom ko Mancin, nanoya ocoren ko citodongay tayra niyaro' no Kaliyawan mihinom to finawlan, nanoya mapalasawaday aca ko tatiih no demak. nika toyaan ocoren haca no Mancin ci Zhang Zhaolian ko sofitay, nano masapatotay demak to 2 folad i malaliyaw haca masasiwtoc, patayen no Kaliyawan tamdaw ko kakeridan ca Wen Yulin 10 tamdaw : 84. 'Ayaw o nano sini'adaay ci Wu Zancheng tonini a demak, misalatiih to cingra to sapilenlenaw mitekop to Kaliyawan a sangasaw, nanoyaan mitelek to ko sofitay no Mancin a mi'epec to Kaliyawan a ngasaw : 84. Ocoren ni Wu Zancheng kakeridan no sofitay ci Sun Kaihua mitekop, ato sofitay no riyaran saka pito, pakatamina tayra i Kalinko minato : 131. Naitiya ceringen ko Fucin tosaay komi no sofitay tayra i Sincen nitena' i Cuapo, patongal to sofitay to 2000 tamdaw : 131. Nao mili'ayaw ko halaka ni Sun Kaihua milefek to Kaliyawan. Nikawrira i 9 folad 5 romi'ad i pisolap i Milon itiya, malipalaw no Kaliyawan tamdaw, mapatay ko pinapina no Mancin. Orasaka li'ayaw sato ci Sun Kaihua milood to i Takofuan niyaro' a Sakizayan finacadan, paliteked to Kaliyawan ngasaw : 131. Saka tosa romi'ad, ocoren ni Sun Kaihua ko midamaay kakeridan ci Li Guang pakaitira i Milon minato to sofitay, patayraen ko itiraay i Sincen sofitay i Cuapo pakamaro' : 131. Oci Sun Kaihua ko mikeriday to sofitay milood to Kaliyawan ngasaw, nika niocoran ci Hu Dexing, Wu Ligui, Zhu Shangpan , Li Ying (Commander-in-Chief), ato ci Liu Hongshun mikerid to sofitay tayra i Takofuan : 131 . Matengil noya kakeridan no Kaliyawan ngasaw ci Dafu Wanu i, tangsol sa mikerid to finawlan midama to Takofuan, nika matena' no sofitay no Mancin, mapatay aca ci Dafu Wanu itiya : 131 . O nano mataliyokay no fitonay a aol ko salawacan no Takofuan niyaro', caay pakacomod ko sofitay no Mancin . Rikor mafana' to ko sofitay toya toloay cinanomay sacomod 'adawang, itiya to midoedo toya pakayraan sacood a milood . Nika oya sacomod madadi'ec, tona micomod ko sofitay i, malipalaw no Sakizaya tamdaw a mipatay . Itiya sato o lamal to ko sapilood no sofitay no Mancin, pasifitonay a aol milood to lamal, saka maemin to malefek to ko niyaro' . Nanoya o kasasowasowal to no kakitaan no niyaro' masasowal a mitelek, maocor han to ko kakeridan ci Komod Pazik ato fafahi ci Icep Kanasaw tayra i sofitay no Mancin to katapi' . Ikor no katapi' no Sakizaya tamdaw i, tatingen no sofitay i kilang no tool ci Komod Pazik a mipatay . Roma sato pala'en no sofitay ko ta'akay tool a kilang, 'atepen ci Icep Kanasaw i sasifo', ta kalicen no mo'etepay tamdaw a miripa' milepi, itiya i ka'atep a mapatay . Ceringen no sofitay no Mancin papinengneng i lawac ko Sakizaya tadaw ato 'Amis tamdaw, todong pipatalaw . I 9 folad 7 romi'ad to kacereman no rimi'ad, miliya haca ko sofitay no Mancin milood to Kaliyawan tamdaw, caay to pakafilo k Kaliyawan tamdaw, satararikor sato : 131. Palalefolefod sa ko pilood, nika caay kafana' to pakayraan, o semosemotan ko pilimekan no Kaliyawan tamdaw, nanoya patiko sato ko sofitay no Mancin, padoedo to masasongarad : 131. Saka tosa kacereman no rimi'ad, pakaikatimol aoaolan milood ci Wu Guangliang, ci Sun Kaihua sato milipalaw nai kaetip katimol miraod, itira to i salaedan no Milon 'alo milipalaw milood to Kaliyawan ngasaw : 131 . Kalahokan to, malood to ni Sun Jun ko pikacawan no Kaliyawan tamdaw, mapatay ko salofan semo'ot tamdaw no Kaliyawan, milaliw to ko mafadocay : 131. Nanoyaan, oya kecor sanay a Natawran, Pokpok a sangasaw o doedo sanay to : 132. Nanoya o Truku finacadan milipalaw a milood to Kaliyawan, mataliyok to no kawali, kaetip, katimol, ka'amis a ada saka tapi' sato : 132 . Piharatengan
S.PHON: == ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i kaɾijawan == ɾo~uɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i kaɾijawan ano~u əʦa tako~ufo~uan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ħan ko~u so~uwaɾ , o~u nano~u kab~vaɾan (kəb~b~vaɾan) ato~u saki*aja a ɾəkapo~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u manʦin i **** miħəʦaan . pakajni to~unini a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u sakataɬ~ɮamaan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan saʡətaɾ kaɾinko~u, maəminaj matəko~up ko~u kab~vaɾan ato~u saki*aja i ɾəkapo~utan ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ itija, o~uja "ao~u~uso~ua/ħo~u~usan" "aniniaj kaɾinko~u, po~uso~uŋ) a kataɬ~ɮamaanan : **. o~u sapikiɬ~ɮakiɬ~ɮaw to~u ao~u~uso~ua satənaʡ, saka mao~uʦo~ur ʦi sħən b~b~vao~u*ħən kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u manʦin to~u sapi nano~uja o~u kasaso~uwaso~uwaɾ to~u no~u kakitaan no~u nijaro~uʡ masaso~uwaɾ a mitəɾək, mao~uʦo~ur ħan to~u ko~u kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ pa*ik ato~u fafaħi ʦi iʦəp kanasaw tajra i so~ufitaj no~u manʦin to~u katapiʡ . iko~ur no~u katapiʡ no~u saki*aja tamɬ~ɮaw i, tatiŋən no~u so~ufitaj i kiɾaŋ no~u to~uo~uɾ ʦi ko~umo~uɬ~ɮ pa*ik a mipataj . ro~uma sato~u paɾaʡən no~u so~ufitaj ko~u taʡakaj to~uo~uɾ a kiɾaŋ, ʡatəpən ʦi iʦəp kanasaw i sasifo~uʡ, ta kaɾiʦən no~u mo~uʡətəpaj tamɬ~ɮaw a miripaʡ miɾəpi, itija i kaʡatəp a mapataj . ʦəriŋən no~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin papinəŋnəŋ i ɾawaʦ ko~u saki*aja taɬ~ɮaw ato~u ʡamis tamɬ~ɮaw, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pipataɾaw . i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~u kaʦərəman no~u rimiʡaɬ~ɮ, miɾija ħaʦa ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj to~u pakafiɾo~u k kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, satarariko~ur sato~u : ***. paɾaɾəfo~uɾəfo~uɬ~ɮ sa ko~u piɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, nika ʦaaj kafanaʡ to~u pakajraan, o~u səmo~usəmo~utan ko~u piɾiməkan no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja patiko~u sato~u ko~u so~ufitaj no~u manʦin, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u masaso~uŋaraɬ~ɮ : ***. saka to~usa kaʦərəman no~u rimiʡaɬ~ɮ, pakaikatimo~uɾ ao~uao~uɾan miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ ʦi wo~u~u *o~u~uaŋɾiaŋ, ʦi so~u~un kaiħo~u~ua sato~u miɾipaɾaw nai kaətip katimo~uɾ mirao~uɬ~ɮ, itira to~u i saɾaəɬ~ɮan no~u miɾo~un ʡaɾo~u miɾipaɾaw miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan ŋasaw : *** . kaɾaħo~ukan to~u, maɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ni so~u~un *o~u~un ko~u pikaʦawan no~u kaɾijawan tamɬ~ɮaw, mapataj ko~u saɾo~ufan səmo~uʡo~ut tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kaɾijawan, miɾaɾiw to~u ko~u mafaɬ~ɮo~uʦaj : ***. nano~ujaan, o~uja kəʦo~ur sanaj a natawran, po~ukpo~uk a saŋasaw o~u ɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u sanaj to~u : ***. nano~uja o~u tro~u~uko~u~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan miɾipaɾaw a miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaɾijawan, mataɾijo~uk to~u no~u kawaɾi, kaətip,
